lessons.title: My Blue Bag
lessons.topic: Basic school items and I have a... review

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What can you carry your books in?
questions.hint: You wear it and it has straps.

questions.question_text: What helps you keep your small objects together in your bag?
questions.hint: You open it to find your crayons.

questions.question_text: What do you use to color your pictures in class?

items.example: It is on the school table.

steps.title: My School Bag
steps.text: This is my school. I have a green bag. What is in your bag? It is a yellow book. Open your book. It is on the table.

steps.explanation: Say the color before the thing.

steps.audio_text: I have a big red bag for school. Inside my bag, I have an orange book and a blue eraser. I open the book every day.

steps.prompt: Say: I have a red book.

questions.question_text: What color is the bag in our lesson? (Reading comprehension)
I have a yellow ___. (Grammar Pattern: [Color] [Object].)
Which word means 'to look inside'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: The lesson title is 'My Red Bag'.
Complete the sentence: My ___ bag is for school.

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which tool helps you draw straight lines?
questions.hint: It's long and flat, with numbers on it!

questions.question_text: What helps you put things together when you need them to stick?
questions.hint: You use it instead of liquid glue!

questions.question_text: What tool do you use to draw colorful pictures?
questions.hint: It's waxy and comes in many colors!

steps.title: My School Bag
steps.text: What is in your bag? I have a big pencil. I have a blue pen. I can write my name. It is on the paper. I can draw a rainbow.

steps.explanation: Use this to say what you own.

steps.audio_text: In my school bag, I have a yellow pencil and a blue marker. I like to write and draw with them every day.

questions.question: What does she like to do with the pencil and marker?

steps.prompt: Say: What is in your bag?

questions.question_text: Which tool do you use to write?
What is in your ___? (Grammar question)
Fill in the blank: I like to ___ on my paper. (Reading comprehension)
True or False: A pen is used to eat.

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which item do you use to color a picture?
What tool do you need to cut paper?
questions.hint: It's sharp and has two blades!

questions.question_text: Which item helps when writing, but is not a pen?

items.example: What is in your pencil box? I have a small eraser.
I have a long ruler in my bag.
It is on the big desk.
The book is on the desk.

steps.title: My School Bag
steps.text: I have a big desk. The eraser is on the desk. My ruler is long and blue. What is in your bag? My pen is in the bag!

steps.explanation: Use 'in' to show inside a place.

steps.audio_text: In my school bag, I have a blue ruler and a yellow pencil. The ruler is on the desk, and I'm holding the pencil.

steps.prompt: Say: It is on the desk.

questions.question_text: What do you use to erase pencil?
It is ___ the desk. (Grammar question)
Which tool helps measure things?
True or False: An eraser is used for measuring.
If the ruler is not in the bag, where is it? (Reading comprehension question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to write on paper?
questions.hint: It's long, thin, and makes marks on paper.

questions.question_text: What do teachers write on to show the lesson?
questions.hint: It's big and on the classroom wall.

questions.question_text: Where do you put your lunch at school?
questions.hint: It keeps your food safe at school.

steps.title: Emma's Classroom
steps.text: I am Emma. I have a blue book. In my bag, there is an orange eraser and a pink crayon. My pencil is on the chair. I love my classroom!

steps.audio_text: In my school bag, I have a red apple for snack time. I also carry a brown teddy bear that keeps me company during breaks.

questions.question: What keeps the child company during breaks?

steps.prompt: What is in your school bag? Say, 'I have a ___ and a ___.'
steps.expected_text: i have a pencil and a book

questions.question_text: What is in your school bag? (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'notebook'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: A desk is something you sit on.
Where is the pencil? It is on the ___ (Grammar and reading comprehension question)
What do you use to see the time? (Comprehension question)
